name: RF_guided_4criterion_v2
description: Best-precision leaf from RF-guided decision tree (depth 4, min_leaf 15, top-10 RF features): active C0 oxidative/epithelial program, no CCND1 amp, no chr17q/NACA2 amp, high C1 heterogeneity. C1_sd > 0.76 corrected from prior erroneous C1_sd <= 0.76. DepMap precision: 15/16 = 93.8%.
